<abox>
- hasVisualFeature(Target, spiky_petals)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, cone_shaped_center)
</abox>

- The TBox defines Class 34 as having both spiky petals and a cone-shaped center.
- Therefore, the Target Image is classified as Class 34.
</dl_explanation>
<response>34</response>

raw_response_text:
<tbox>
- [Class 81] equiv hasVisualFeature(Clematis flower) and hasVisualFeature(purple petals) and hasVisualFeature(prominent veins)
- [Class 34] equiv hasVisualFeature(Eryngium flower) and hasVisualFeature(blue petals) and hasVisualFeature(spiky appearance)
- [Class 88] equiv hasVisualFeature(Nasturtium flower) and hasVisualFeature(red or yellow petals) and hasVisualFeature(trumpet shape)
- [Class 71] equiv hasVisualFeature(Azalea flower) and hasVisualFeature(pink or red petals) and hasVisualFeature(funnel shape)
</tbox>
<abox>
- hasVisualFeature(Target, Clematis flower)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, pink and white petals)
- hasVisualFeature(Target, prominent veins)
</abox>
<dl_explanation>
- The Target Image displays a flower with characteristics that match the definition of Class 81.
- Specifically, the Target Image shows a Clematis flower with pink and white petals and prominent veins, which are all sufficient visual features to classify it as Class 81 according to the provided examples.
</dl_explanation>
<response>81</response>
